edge_types.name: INVESTED_IN
edge_types.description: VC firm provided capital to the startup

edge_types.name: REGULATES_FILING
edge_types.description: Regulator oversees or reviews the IPO application

edge_types.name: REPORTS_ON
edge_types.description: Media outlet publishes coverage about the startup’s IPO journey

edge_types.name: EVALUATES

edge_types.name: USES_SERVICE_OF
edge_types.description: Enterprise customer deploys or references the startup’s technology

edge_types.name: PARTNERS_WITH

edge_types.name: COMMENTED_ON
edge_types.description: Person posted public commentary (e.g., on social media or forums) about the IPO

analysis_summary: 文本聚焦于‘有孚’（假设为一家拟上市的中国云/数据中心科技公司）上市前的舆论生态。需建模的关键发声主体包括：创始人、投资方（VC）、监管机构（如CSRC）、科技媒体、机构投资者、行业分析师、云基础设施同业/合作伙伴、企业客户。这些角色在IPO前期通过融资披露、监管问询、媒体报道、研报发布、客户背书等行为共同塑造舆论走向。兜底类型Person和Organization确保覆盖未明确归类的个体与组织，符合社交媒体模拟中长尾主体的表达需求。
simulation_requirement: 分析一下有孚在上市前的舆论走向
